business.title: 4th consecutive HMO award excites Leadway Health MD
business.desc: TOKUNBO Alli, the Managing Director of Leadway Health, on Tuesday described the 2026 Health Maintenance Organisation (HMO) award as a validation of the company’s commitment. business.title: year high on potential listing of data centre business
business.desc: Shares of YTL Power International Bhd (KL:YTLPOWR) climbed to their highest level in nearly two years on Wednesday, after RHB Investment Bank said it may list its data centre business next year.

business.title: Live updates: June 2026 deliveries for major automakers in China
business.desc: Leapmotor, Nio and Xpeng each set their highest monthly delivery record so far this year in June.

business.title: S$55 million Good Class Bungalow seized in connection with Nvidia chip movement case
business.desc: The police issued a prohibition of disposal order against the GCB and seized S$1 million of funds in bank accounts as part of their investigations, which have resulted in additional charges for the four people allegedly involved.

business.title: Malaysia’s airport planning ‘too reactive’, airlines warn
business.desc: Airline executives told a PAC hearing last year that Malaysia needs forward-looking infrastructure plans instead of reactive responses to issues at airports, such as airline capacity.
